query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Out-of-focus circular light spots in warm orange, soft white, and cool blue tones arranged diagonally across a black background, creating overlapping soft-edged orbs of varying size and brightness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image composed entirely of intentional blur, where light sources dissolve into soft overlapping bokeh circles with no discernible subject, rendering fine details absent across the entire frame.
